/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -Wall -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/DH2323SkeletonSDL2.dir/skeletonSDL2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DH2323SkeletonSDL2.dir/SDL2Auxiliary/SDL2Auxiliary.cpp.o -o DH2323SkeletonSDL2  /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2.dylib -framework Cocoa /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2main.a
